tnt 1.1.0

  init               Initialize the current directory. Creates the '.tnt'
                     directory and the 'sources.json' file.

  add                Add a new language or assembly.

  remove             Remove an assembly from the list of sources.

  extract            Extract all strings from all sources and update the
                     translations.

  gc                 Remove all unused translation records.

  status             Show all the translations and their status.

  export             Export all strings to Excel or XLIFF files.

  import             Import Excel or XLIFF translation files and apply the
                     changes to the translations in the current directory.

  translate          Machine translate new strings.

  sync               Synchronize all the translations in the '.tnt-content'
                     directory.

  show               Show system related or detail information.

  add-command        Add a new shell command.

  remove-commands    Remove shell commands.

  list-commands      List shell commands.

  edit-commands      Edit shell commands.

  help               Display more information on a specific command.

  version            Display version information.

  -l, --language    Language (code ['-' region] or name) to be exported.

  --all             Export all languages.

  --to              The directory to export the files to. Default is the current
                    directory.

  --format          Export format (default 'excel'). Use 'xliff' for an xliff
                    version 1.2 editor, 'xliff-mat' for the Multilingual App
                    Toolkit.

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.

  value pos. 0      The language(s) to export, use --all to export all
                    languages.
